---
title: "Sounds & Phonemes"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
# Learning Goals: Sounds & Phonemes
1. Be able to define the following terms: *phoneme*, *phonetic feature*, *contrastive*
1. Identify the regions of the brain that are involved in processing sounds
1. Describe the evidence for the following claim: The brain represents sounds in terms of phonetic features
:::

| Date | Topic | Reading | Slides | Poll |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| Thurs 9/17 | Sounds & Phonemes | SGN Ch. 3: *Sounds in the Brain* |<span class="blue-badge">↗</span>| |
| Tues 9/22 | Sounds & Phonemes | Mesgarani et al. 2014 | |
